sources_used: EdgeProp Bandar Utama area outlook (median terrace price/psf)
notes: Estimate is based on current Bandar Utama freehold terrace asking prices and one transacted comp. The most relevant live asks cluster around RM1.35m-RM1.51m for ~1,650-1,830 sq ft land and ~2,100-2,200 sq ft built-up, while 2.5-storey units in BU7 range from RM1.35m to RM1.85m. EdgeProp’s Bandar Utama area outlook shows terrace-house median price about RM1.445m and median psf about RM828 (land-based). I applied a modest premium for the subject’s larger 1,830 sq ft land area versus common 22x75 (1,650 sq ft) lots. Price per sq ft is expressed on land area basis.
